overview: This image appears to show an Oxyopes species lynx spider, specifically resembling the white-backed Oxyopes shweta. Lynx spiders are active hunters known for ambushing prey rather than spinning webs. They are characterized by long legs covered in prominent spines, which help them grasp insects. These spiders are often found on leaves or flowers in warm climates across Asia, India, and China. Wikipedia +5 6 sites Oxyopes shweta - Wikipedia

This image appears to show an Oxyopes species lynx spider, specifically resembling the white-backed Oxyopes shweta.
Lynx spiders are active hunters known for ambushing prey rather than spinning webs.
They are characterized by long legs covered in prominent spines, which help them grasp insects.
These spiders are often found on leaves or flowers in warm climates across Asia, India, and China.
